CustomField.formula: IF ( AND ( Birthday__c >= DATE (1868,09,08), Birthday__c <= DATE (1912,07,29)), "明治" & TEXT ( YEAR ( Birthday__c ) - 1867 ) & "年" & TEXT ( MONTH ( Birthday__c )) & "月" & TEXT ( DAY ( Birthday__c )) & "日", IF ( AND ( Birthday__c >= DATE (1912,07,30), Birthday__c <= DATE (1926,12,24)), "大正" & TEXT ( YEAR ( Birthday__c ) - 1911) & "年" & TEXT ( MONTH ( Birthday__c )) & "月" & TEXT ( DAY ( Birthday__c )) & "日", IF ( AND ( Birthday__c >= DATE (1926,12,25), Birthday__c <= DATE (1989,01,07)), "昭和" & TEXT ( YEAR ( Birthday__c ) - 1925 ) & "年" & TEXT ( MONTH ( Birthday__c )) & "月" & TEXT ( DAY ( Birthday__c )) & "日", IF ( AND ( Birthday__c >= DATE (1989,01,08), Birthday__c <= DATE (2019,04,30)), "平成" & TEXT ( YEAR ( Birthday__c ) - 1988 ) & "年" & TEXT ( MONTH ( Birthday__c )) & "月" & TEXT ( DAY ( Birthday__c )) & "日", IF ( Birthday__c >= DATE (2019,05,01), "令和" & TEXT ( YEAR ( Birthday__c) - 2018) & "年" & TEXT ( MONTH ( Birthday__c )) & "月" & TEXT ( DAY ( Birthday__c )) & "日", "#エラー")))))
CustomField.label: 生年月日（和暦）
